name: US Cash Advance
description_short: Mesa, AZ's US Cash Advance location at 819 S Country Club Dr offers quick payday and title loans with same-day funding.
description_long:
US Cash Advance is located at 819 S Country Club Dr #1106 in Mesa, AZ, operating as a standalone financial services storefront. The location is open Monday through Friday from 8 AM to 9 PM, and Saturday through Sunday from 10 AM to 7 PM, making it convenient for working professionals in the Mesa area.

At this Mesa location, you can apply for payday loans, title loans, and related lending services with a quick turnaround. The team can walk you through your borrowing options and help you understand terms and repayment schedules. For immediate assistance or to discuss your specific financial needs, call +1 602-878-7719.

If you're a Mesa resident facing an unexpected expense or cash flow gap, this location provides accessible short-term lending when you need it most. Bring a valid ID, proof of income, and proof of address to your appointment. US Cash Advance specializes in helping people bridge temporary financial gaps with straightforward, transparent lending.
address: 819 S Country Club Dr #1106, Mesa, AZ 85210

company_info.headquarters: 819 S Country Club Dr #1106, Mesa, AZ 85210

pros: Same-day or rapid cash disbursement (2-hour turnaround documented in reviews)
In-person service with trained staff (specifically praised for patience and clear explanations)
Accepts all credit types including bad credit—no credit check loans available
Transparent service model per customer reviews—staff explicitly explained repayment terms with no hidden fees mentioned
Extended hours (8am-9pm weekdays, 10am-7pm weekends) accommodating working customers
Loan amounts up to $50,000 for bad credit products (broader than typical payday loans)
cons: No online APR, rates, or fee information disclosed on website—critical pricing transparency missing
Operates through third-party lender connections rather than direct lending, creating middleman uncertainty
Physical location only (Detroit) limits accessibility; website suggests this is one storefront
Customer review mentions cramped waiting area, suggesting operational/capacity constraints
No mention of state regulatory compliance or licensing information on website
best_for: Consumers in Detroit needing emergency cash within hours who prefer in-person service
Borrowers with bad credit or thin credit files rejected by traditional lenders
Individuals facing unexpected expenses who value transparent staff communication over online convenience
diagnosis: US Cash Advance is best for Detroit-area consumers with damaged credit who need emergency cash today and prefer face-to-face interaction with staff. The critical caveat is the complete absence of disclosed APRs, fees, or repayment terms—customers cannot comparison-shop or verify affordability before committing, and the third-party lender model creates uncertainty about actual terms and regulatory oversight.
meta_description: US Cash Advance at 819 S Country Club Dr, Mesa, AZ. Get quick cash with same-day payday and title loans.
